headline: TWO LENSES, ONE QUALITY SYSTEM
subheading: How internal self-inspection and external GMP audits work together to keep you inspection-ready.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial concept of duality and self-examination in pharmaceutical quality assurance, set against a deep navy background. The composition is split into two mirrored halves that reflect and complement each other: on one side, a polished mirror-like surface in teal and cyan reflecting a clean geometric form, evoking honest internal self-inspection; on the other side, a separate magnifying lens of glass casting a focused teal beam across the divide, evoking independent external scrutiny across an organisational boundary. Between them, fine interlocking circular audit-loop rings and a subtle checklist-grid motif rendered as luminous teal and cyan line work, suggesting CAPA cycles and shared discipline. A single fresh-green accent line threads through both halves, linking them as two halves of one system. Floating frosted-glass panels, soft refracted light, precise stainless-steel sheen, shallow depth of field with elegant bokeh. Clinical-luxury mood, calm, precise, premium and trustworthy. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
